index.logged_in_select_menu: You're logged in. Select from the menu above.
login.account_locked: Your account has been locked by an administrator. Please contact your system administrator for assistance.
login.failed_invalid: Invalid username or password. Please try again.
login.logged_out_inactive: You've been automatically logged out because you've been inactive for :minutes minutes. Click on the 'Log in' link to get back into the system.
login.rate_limited: You have exceeded the maximum login attempts. Please wait before trying again.
login.session_expired: You were logged out because your session expired. Log in again to continue.
maintenance.code_example:
# Example: Different role values
LDAP_ADMIN_ROLE=administrator
LDAP_MAINTAINER_ROLE=maintainer
maintenance.conflict.same_roles: Admin and Maintainer roles are both set to ':role'
maintenance.fix_body: Set different values for admin and maintainer roles/group names in your environment variables:
maintenance.restart_note: After fixing the configuration, restart the application for changes to take effect.
maintenance.why_body: The system detected that admin and maintainer roles/group names are set to the same values. This breaks the access control system because the system cannot distinguish between administrators and maintainers.
manage.dashboard.heading: Management Dashboard
manage.dashboard.lead: Welcome to the management dashboard. Select an area to manage:
manage.dashboard.quick_access_lead: As an organization administrator, you can quickly access your organization's management area:
manage.dashboard.role_mgmt_desc: Manage system roles and user assignments.
manage.dashboard.user_mgmt_desc: Manage system users, roles, and permissions.
manage.submenu.email_disabled: Email is disabled. Password reset and welcome emails are unavailable. Run the email verification (e.g. bin/verify-email.php) or check SMTP configuration.
manage.common.display_name_hint: Auto-filled from First Name + Last Name (you can edit it).
manage.common.email_username_hint: Email will be used as the username for login
manage.common.quick_add_lead: Add a new user to this organization. The email address will be used as the username for login.
manage.common.new_password_optional: New Password (leave blank to keep unchanged)
manage.org_users.modal.lock_body:
Are you sure you want to lock the user account for ?

Warning: This will prevent the user from logging in until the account is unlocked.
manage.org_users.modal.unlock_body:
Are you sure you want to unlock the user account for ?

This will allow the user to log in again.
manage.org_users.modal.delete_body:
Are you sure you want to delete the user ""?

Warning: This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated data.

Note: This will permanently delete the user account from this organization.
manage.org_users.email_reset_checkbox: Email password reset link (user sets a new password)
password.change.score_help: Current strength score: :score (0=Very Weak, 1=Weak, 2=Fair, 3=Good, 4=Strong). A score of :min or higher is required.
password.reset.message: If the address exists, a password reset link has been sent.
password.reset.lead: Enter your email address. If it exists in our directory, we will send you a link to set a new password.
password.set.success: Your password has been updated. You can now log in.
password.set.fail_admin: Failed to set password. Please contact an administrator.
setup.admin_password_prompt: Enter the LDAP admin or setup password to continue.
password.change.bullet1: Use this form to change your :org password. When you start typing your new password the gauge at the bottom will show its security strength. Enter your password again in the confirm field. If the passwords don't match then both fields will be bordered with red.
password.change.bullet2: Password Strength Requirement: Your password must achieve a strength score of :score (:level) or higher. The strength meter below will show your password's current score as you type.
oidc.callback.title: Authentication Error
oidc.callback.body: There was an error during the authentication process. Please try again.
manage.orgs.heading: Organization Management
manage.orgs.no_access_list: No organizations found or you don't have permission to view any organizations.
manage.orgs.ldap_conn_failed: Failed to connect to LDAP server. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.ldap_fail: LDAP connection failed. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.member_ok: Organization ':org' has been marked as a member organization.
manage.orgs.msg.member_fail: Failed to mark organization ':org' as member. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.unmember_ok: Organization ':org' has been removed from member organizations.
manage.orgs.msg.unmember_fail: Failed to remove organization ':org' from member organizations. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.perm_denied: Permission denied or invalid organization name.
manage.orgs.msg.lock_ok: Organization ':org' has been locked successfully. All users in this organization are now disabled.
manage.orgs.msg.lock_fail: Failed to lock organization ':org'. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.unlock_ok: Organization ':org' has been unlocked successfully. All users in this organization are now enabled.
manage.orgs.msg.unlock_fail: Failed to unlock organization ':org'. Please check the logs for details.
manage.orgs.msg.delete_fail: Failed to delete organization ':org'. Please check the logs for details.
